name: AmeriCash Loans - 92nd & Capitol
description_short: AmeriCash Loans - 92nd & Capitol is a Milwaukee-based personal installment loan lender offering same-day funding with in-person application at their northwestern location.
description_long:
AmeriCash Loans operates a physical lending location at 9228 W Capitol Drive in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, serving the local community with personal installment loan services. The company positions itself as a direct lender focused on simplifying the loan application process through in-person interaction with trained staff. Their Milwaukee-based team emphasizes a streamlined, step-by-step application process designed to move customers quickly from application to funding.

The 92nd & Capitol location offers personal installment loans with the potential for same-day cash disbursement upon approval. The facility operates extended hours (Monday-Friday 9am-7pm, Saturday 9am-3pm) to accommodate working customers. The company highlights its convenient location in northwestern Milwaukee, positioned near major landmarks and transportation corridors, making it accessible to the surrounding community.

AmeriCash distinguishes itself through its brick-and-mortar presence and local staffing model, contrasting with fully online lenders. The company emphasizes convenience and personal service, with staff available to guide applicants through each stage of the loan process. Their same-day funding capability and extended Saturday hours suggest targeting working-class borrowers who need quick access to capital during non-standard business hours.

The website provides limited detail about loan terms, APR ranges, minimum/maximum loan amounts, or specific eligibility requirements. No information is disclosed about credit score requirements, repayment periods, or comparative pricing. The company does not transparently communicate lending practices or provide loan calculators. For consumers, this opacity means applicants must visit in-person or call to understand actual loan costs and terms before committing.
pros: Extended hours including Saturday service (9am-3pm) for working customers
In-person application process with dedicated Milwaukee-based staff guidance
Conveniently located in northwestern Milwaukee near Highway 190 and nearby parks
Step-by-step application support to simplify the borrowing process
Accessible location just minutes from Timmerman Airport
cons: Website lacks transparency on APR ranges, loan terms, or repayment periods
No disclosure of credit score requirements or eligibility criteria
Minimum and maximum loan amounts not specified on website
Limited information about fees, prepayment penalties, or other loan costs
No online application option; in-person visit required for most interactions
best_for: Milwaukee-area residents needing quick access to personal cash without traveling
Working customers who need evening or Saturday availability for loan applications
Borrowers who prefer face-to-face interactions and staff guidance over online processes
diagnosis: AmeriCash Loans - 92nd & Capitol is best suited for Milwaukee-area residents seeking personal installment loans with immediate funding and prefer in-person service. The main caveat is the lack of transparent disclosure about loan terms, APRs, and costs on their website—prospective borrowers must visit or call to understand actual lending rates and conditions before applying.
